Appearances:
Paula Buttler, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Bethel Housing Corporation DBA Freedom West Homes I and II.
David John Briggs representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Fannie Barlow is present.
Jason Wolford representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date of August 27, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. remains as set
